summary: CRITICAL: Task explicitly required TDD with bats tests, sample fixtures (JUnit XML + JSON files), and ALL tests running through act with act-result.txt artifact. MISSING: (1) No test file (*.bats), (2) No test fixtures, (3) Workflow doesn't run tests or create act-result.txt, (4) No actionlint validation step, (5) No fixture setup in workflow. Script issues: parse_junit() uses fragile awk/sed regex (lines 28-49) without test coverage — unmaintainable without unit tests. aggregate.sh lacks error handling for malformed input and jq dependency failures. Workflow publishes summary but never validates its correctness against expected output. Deliverable is ~20% complete; core testing infrastructure entirely absent.
